decisions.title: Adopt pgvector
decisions.rationale: data volume stays low and team is already on Postgres

decisions.title: Deploy to Railway
decisions.rationale: Railway Postgres tier includes pgvector and worker deploys are painless
decisions.source_quote: Let's deploy to Railway for the MVP

action_items.title: Write the ADR for pgvector
action_items.source_quote: please write the ADR by Friday

action_items.title: Set up the Railway project
action_items.source_quote: please set up the Railway project by end of week

summary.tldr: Team decided to adopt pgvector and deploy to Railway for the MVP. Priya writes the ADR by Friday and Omar sets up Railway by end of week.
